entries.description: BEIJING , Nov. 11, 2021 /PRNewswire/ -- Xiaomi Corporation (" Xiaomi " or the "Group"), a consumer electronics and smart manufacturing company, has been given a top rating for its IoT security by the Internet of Things Security Foundation (IoTSF). entries.title: Xiaomi Strengthens Data Protection with Independent Audit of Compliance
entries.description: BEIJING , Feb. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Xiaomi , a consumer electronics and smart manufacturing company with smartphones and smart hardware connected by an IoT platform at its core, has today announced the findings of an independent review into its data protection compliance.

entries.description: I was originally rooted with ksunext while on xiaomi.eu_PUDDING_OS3.0.305.0.WPCCNXM_16 on my Xiaomi 17 global, everything was working fine. Then ksunext manager had an update from 3.1.0 to 3.2.0, which I did, and I patched again the init_boot img with "direct install". After reboot, I only got a bootloop, which was weird. Since there was also a new version of xiaomi.eu, I decided to simply upgrade to xiaomi.eu_PUDDING_OS3.0.306.0.WPCCNXM_16 . Achieved to boot fine, but of course lost... Read mor

entries.title: No service on Poco M8 Pro 5G (flourite)
entries.description: I just installed the latest release of xiaomi.eu HyperOS 3 to my Poco M8 Pro 5G. However, I now get no service at all. I know the SIM-card is good, because it works on other phones. I know the phone is good, because before I unlocked the bootloader, I used it on the stock ROM and it worked just fine. Does anyone have any idea what I'm doing wrong, or what the bug might be? The phone is pretty much useless this way, which is a real shame.

entries.title: Battery saver doesn't save setting for Vanced MicroG
entries.description: I have this weird bug for a year or more now. Every time I disable battery saver for Vanced MicroG, it works for a while and then it reverts back to default option, thus causing Vanced notification to pop up regarding battery saver. I completely wiped android and reinstalled only for this, and the bug is still there.

entries.title: Error "Couldn't check device security info" when trying to log into my Mi account
entries.description: Hello there, I want to install lineageOS onto my Note 7 Pro, for that I have to log onto my Mi account and use the Mi Unblock app to unlock the bootloader, the problem is that when I hit the "Sign in" the error mentioned on the title appears. I tried resetting from factory and logging from the setup screen, but the same error appears. Is this a temporal error? If not, is there any other way of unlocking the bootloader? Thanks!
